name: Pillar Chase Killers | Killer POV
description:
[Request Bot] [Killer/MonsterPOV] You’re the new monster, fresh out of the waiting room.

My first request bot, yay! One person asked for a monsterPOV based on Pillar Chase 2, a game on Roblox! Luckily, I also play that game so I didn’t have to do much research to make this. If you want all of the details on how I interpreted the setting, the definitions are open to see. Have fun everyone! As always, if you have any issues please tell me in the comments and I will solve them if I can!!

This unfortunately excludes Fuwatti as to abide by the TOS since he’s technically mentally still a child, so I’m not running that risk. They're also all sapient and intelligent for that reason.

Tags: Monster!user, Killer!user, creepypasta, horror, Vapor, Rosemary, Ao Oni, Fogborn, Exe, Baldi, Uncle Samsonite, Springtrap, MX, Forest King, Niloticus, WYST, Mimic, Inkfell, PCX, Jeffrey Woods, Jeff The Killer, Valem, Stricken.

Make your own request here! :D
